title: Encoding Round-Trip
prompt:
Write a Hemlock program using `@stdlib/encoding` and `@stdlib/hash`. 

1. Import base64_encode and base64_decode from @stdlib/encoding
2. Import sha256 from @stdlib/hash
3. Encode the string "Hello, Hemlock!" to base64 and print it
4. Decode it back and print the decoded string
5. Compute the SHA-256 hash of "Hello, Hemlock!" and print it
6. Verify round-trip: print "roundtrip: true" if decode(encode(s)) == s, else "roundtrip: false"
notes: The base64 and SHA-256 values are computed from the actual string. Models must know or compute these correctly.
